title: Grilled Peach Glazed Pork Chops
description: Sweet and savory, these pork chops are grilled to perfection and topped with a honey-glazed peach sauce.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, whisk together lime juice, pink pepper, and 1 tbsp honey.
3. Place pork chops in a shallow dish and brush with the lime juice mixture.
4. Let pork chops marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
5. Grill pork chops for 5-7 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
6. Meanwhile, grill peaches for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they're caramelized and slightly tender.
7. In a small saucepan, combine the remaining 1 tbsp honey and 1 tbsp water.
8. Bring the honey mixture to a simmer over medium heat and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until it's thickened and syrupy.
9. Brush the honey glaze over the grilled pork chops during the last minute of cooking.
10. Serve pork chops with grilled peaches and additional honey glaze, if desired.
